name: Not Miss Lily's Olives Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese to a smooth consistency.
2. Blend in the sour cream and then the remaining ingredients.
3. Blend well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 2 1/4 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Scallions, Jalapeno Peppers, Celery Root, Potato Chips, Duck Sausage
